disagreement_resolutions.subject: front versus back complete width consequence
disagreement_resolutions.resolution: front owns physical width; back remains comparison and color evidence

disagreement_resolutions.subject: top versus bottom depth consequence
disagreement_resolutions.resolution: center-align the exact top and bottom object rectangles and preserve the arithmetic-mean depth as axial comparison and orientation evidence; it does not override the later candidate-specific final-depth rule

disagreement_resolutions.subject: right rune-side versus metal-center-piece half depth
disagreement_resolutions.resolution: preserve two candidates at one common right-view scale; these candidate-specific depths control final completed geometry and may not be normalized to each other or to the centered axial mean

disagreement_resolutions.subject: right object-bounds center versus diamond rotation center
disagreement_resolutions.resolution: use the exact diamond-center source edge x=557 as the construction axis

disagreement_resolutions.subject: front stations versus unresolved back stations
disagreement_resolutions.resolution: front scanlines own longitudinal component stations; back owns back-facing color registration only

unknown_resolutions.resolution: C02 and C03 retain front-owned stone surfaces; the selected right candidate half owns the positive-X strike face; one Rz180 completion owns the opposite face
unknown_resolutions.authority: component equations B02 plus the R8 run-specific Rz180 approval

unknown_resolutions.resolution: stone hidden boundaries are only straight ruled faces between corresponding measured owner boundaries inside the stone domains
unknown_resolutions.authority: component equations B06 and deterministic closure amendment

unknown_resolutions.resolution: stone and bracing share one measured common boundary; no receiver, backing plate, duplicate wall, or invented thickness is created
front and back focal treatments are separately owned visible surfaces of C01; geometry remains one structural core and no independent hidden plate is added
unknown_resolutions.authority: component equations B02, B04, and B06

unknown_resolutions.resolution: top and bottom directly own visible footprint orientation and color where compatible with the later candidate-depth rule; they may not stretch either final candidate; hidden bracing continuation is limited to measured straight ruled boundary faces
unknown_resolutions.authority: view-owned scale contract plus component equations B06

unknown_resolutions.resolution: the selected right strike-face half is completed once about its own measured centerline; hidden continuation uses only its measured boundary and common stone contact
unknown_resolutions.authority: component equations B01, B02, B06, and the R8 candidate-boundary rule

unknown_resolutions.resolution: C06 joins C07A only at their measured common station by the approved straight half-ring connection; no extra receiver volume is added

unknown_resolutions.authority: exact pi/2 cylinder-wrap rule and Step 14 material boundary

unknown_resolutions.resolution: C09 through C11 use exact front-owned radius-versus-Z surfaces and approved common contacts; view-specific pommel insets remain material ownership
unknown_resolutions.authority: component equations B03, B04, B05, and deterministic closure amendment

unknown_resolutions.resolution: dark pixels remain exact source-visible color evidence; they do not create relief, holes, or hidden geometry unless another approved geometry equation owns that surface

construction_rules_carried_forward.strike_face: one measured face half duplicated once around its own centerline
construction_rules_carried_forward.head: separately owned source surfaces with one combined exterior boundary and no per-component backing walls
construction_rules_carried_forward.hidden_closure: straight ruled faces between corresponding measured boundaries only
construction_rules_carried_forward.haft: theta(U)=-pi/2+pi*U with exact pi/2 flat-diameter-to-half-circumference factor
